author: doll-agent
content:
Phase 1 (the unblock-isnat path) landed via Option A:

- ferray-core/src/dtype/datetime.rs (new): TimeUnit enum (Ns/Us/Ms/S/M/H/D), DateTime64(pub i64) and Timedelta64(pub i64) repr-transparent newtype Element types, NAT: i64 = i64::MIN sentinel, NaT-as-NaN PartialEq, Display showing 'NaT' or the underlying i64.

- ferray-core/src/dtype/mod.rs: DType::DateTime64(TimeUnit) and DType::Timedelta64(TimeUnit) variants. size_of, alignment, Display, casting (min_scalar_type), promotion (dtype_ord helper replaces the now-unsupported `as u32` cast since DType is no longer fieldless).

- ferray-core/src/dynarray.rs: DynArray paths surface InvalidDtype for time dtypes (no DynArray variants yet — that's the structural follow-up).

- ferray-io/src/npy/dtype_parse.rs: parse '<M8[ns]' / '<m8[ns]' / etc. and emit the same. 6 unit tests cover all units in roundtrip and reject unknown units.

- ferray-io/src/npy/mod.rs: NpyElement impls for DateTime64/Timedelta64 (i64-backed bulk read/write with byte-swap support). 2 unit tests verify NPY save/load roundtrip including the NaT sentinel; the on-disk header carries 'M8[ns]' / 'm8[ns]'.

- ferray-ufunc/src/ops/datetime.rs (new): isnat_datetime / isnat_timedelta. Static type-system enforcement of NumPy's TypeError-on-non-time-dtype contract. 4 unit tests.

- ferray-numpy-interop/src/dtype_map.rs: DType::DateTime64(u) ↔ Arrow Timestamp(ATU::*, None), DType::Timedelta64(u) ↔ Arrow Duration. Arrow only has Ns/Us/Ms/S TimeUnits — minute/hour/day datetime64 surface InvalidDtype. 4 unit tests cover both directions plus the unsupported-unit path.

- Umbrella ferray crate: re-exports DateTime64, Timedelta64, TimeUnit, NAT, isnat_datetime, isnat_timedelta at the top level.

Verification: cargo test --workspace --features ferray/full passes (60 test-result blocks, 0 failures); cargo clippy on every touched crate clean.

Phase 2 (NOT in this batch — kept open here):
- DynArray::DateTime64 / Timedelta64 enum variants + try_into_datetime64 accessor
- Arithmetic kernels: datetime - datetime → timedelta, datetime + timedelta → datetime, scalar promotion across units
- chrono interop: DateTime64<Ns> ↔ chrono::DateTime<Utc>
- ferray-numpy-interop dynarray_to_arrow / record_batch_to_columns dispatch for time types (depends on DynArray widening)

This unblocked #594 (isnat) which is now closed.
